task_completion.description: Log into Odoo and navigate to the Inventory app or Scrap orders section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web interface with the user logged in and the Inventory app or Scrap Orders list open.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A validated scrap order (status 'Done') or a list entry showing product 'Timken 6205-2RS' or 'SCRAP-001' with a quantity of 15.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A validated scrap order (status 'Done') or a list entry showing product 'Gates PowerGrip GT3' or 'SCRAP-002' with a quantity of 8.

task_completion.description: Process and validate a scrap order for 6 units of Festo DNC-40-100-PPV-A (SCRAP-006).

task_completion.description: Ensure no units of SKF 22215 E (SCRAP-004) are scrapped.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scrap orders list does NOT contain any entries for 'SKF 22215 E' or 'SCRAP-004'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to create scrap orders.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Odoo UI, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The scrap orders were genuinely created and validated in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The scrap orders appear in the Odoo list view with a 'Done' status, rather than just being typed into a text editor or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the scrap order list.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open modifying the DOM to show fake scrap quantities.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target scrap quantities: SCRAP-001 (15), SCRAP-002 (8), SCRAP-003 (3), SCRAP-005 (25), SCRAP-006 (6). Distractor product that must NOT be scrapped: SCRAP-004.
